mission.title: argo-workflows: CLI: Support `update` for CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates, and ClusterWorkflowTemplates
mission.description: CLI: Support `update` for CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates, and ClusterWorkflowTemplates. Requested by 38+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-workflows deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
helm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-workflows installation.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
Currently Argo CLI doesn't support updating CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates and ClusterWorkflowTemplates. If we want to change any of these resources, we have to delete first and then recreate them.

steps.title: Apply the fix for CLI: Support `update` for CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates,…
steps.description:
Use the `argo` CLI to update CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates, and ClusterWorkflowTemplates in place without needing to delete and recreate them:
```bash
# Update a WorkflowTemplate from a file
argo template create --strict my-template.yaml

# Update a CronWorkflow from a file
argo cron create my-cron.yaml
```
This avoids the need to delete and recreate resources, which `kubectl apply` does not validate against the Argo Workflows schema.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "CLI: Support `update` for CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates,…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Added CLI support for updating CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates, and ClusterWorkflowTemplates in place. This allows users to modify these resources without deleting and recreating them, with proper schema validation that kubectl does not provide.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
